page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfc6.16xlarge is a compute-optimized instance powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 3.1 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture, this KVM-hypervised server provides 64 physical cores and 64 vCPUs with a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio. The hardware configuration includes 128.0 GB of RAM, yielding 2.0 GB of memory per core, and features a baseline network bandwidth of 20 Gbps. No local storage or GPU resources are bundled with this instance type.

In benchmark evaluations, the ecs.hfc6.16xlarge demonstrates strong multi-core processing capabilities, highlighted by a stress-ng multi-core score of 61243.12 and a Passmark CPU score of 49036.54. Memory performance is robust, with read-only small block cached bandwidth reaching 3400.23 GB/sec and large block uncached read bandwidth at 209.21 GB/sec. Multi-threaded bzip3 decompression also registers a strong performance of 269.5 GB/sec. However, single-core metrics, such as the stress-ng single-core score of 1434.79, and write-heavy memory operations remain in the average tier.

The instance offers a high-density compute profile with dedicated CPU allocation, making it qualitatively cost-efficient for parallelized workloads that do not require local NVMe storage or GPU acceleration. The lack of local storage requires relying on network-attached storage, which is supported by the 20 Gbps baseline network bandwidth.

This server is well-suited for compute-heavy, multi-threaded applications. Appropriate workloads include high-throughput database operations, parallel software compilation, multi-threaded data decompression, and medium-scale web serving.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfc6.16xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 64 dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CY vCPUs running at 3.1 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. Equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM and a 20 Gbps baseline network bandwidth, this KVM-based server does not include local storage or GPU accelerators. Benchmark data highlights strong multi-core CPU performance, with a stress-ng multi-core score of 61243.12 and a Passmark CPU score of 49036.54. It also delivers strong memory read bandwidth and multi-threaded decompression speeds, though single-core performance sits in the average tier. Given its high compute density and lack of local storage, this instance is qualitatively cost-efficient for highly parallelized, network-reliant workloads. It is best suited for multi-threaded data processing, database operations, and high-throughput web serving.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfc6.16xlarge is a compute-optimized server with 64 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and 20 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering strong multi-core performance for parallel workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfc6.16xlarge features 64 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs and 128 GB RAM, optimized for high-throughput multi-core compute workloads.
tagline: A dedicated sixty-four core compute instance delivering strong multi-threaded performance and high-speed memory bandwidth for parallel processing workloads.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CY vCPUs running at 3.1 GHz
128.0 GB of system memory providing 2.0 GB per core
20 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with zero local storage
Strong multi-core CPU and memory read bandwidth benchmarks
Optimized for multi-threaded decompression and database operations
